failedAssertions.reason: Escape closes the token selector modal, but focus does not return to the trigger element; focus lands on BODY instead.
Token selector modal opens with search and token list (CASH/USDC), and selecting USDC updates the input and closes modal, but per-token user balances are not shown in the modal.
No expandable price-details section is visible; no exchange-rate, price-impact, or minimum-received fields were found in the swap card.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Wallet extension integration is unavailable in this environment (wallet modal shows install links for Petra/Nightly/Backpack, with no connected wallet extension available). Fallback disconnected state is observable and stable.
Could not validate disconnect-after-connect behavior because no wallet extension could be connected in this environment. Observable fallback disconnected state is correct.

Could not validate quote-updates-as-you-type behavior because environment data appears unseeded (no chart data, 24H volume $0.00) and receive quote stayed 0 across multiple input changes; USD equivalents were not visible.

Disconnected CTA state is visible, but connected CTA states (Swap / Enter an amount / Insufficient balance) could not be validated because no local Aptos wallet extension is installed and social login requires external account credentials.
Swap execution could not be attempted because wallet connection/signing is unavailable in this isolated run; CTA remains Connect Wallet and no signed transaction path is reachable.
Limit form UI is present (buy/sell toggle, price and amount fields) and can be filled, but Place Order submission via SDK could not be validated without a connected/signing wallet.
